title: Will LeBron James announce his retirement in 2026?

current.rationale_summary: LeBron (41, unrestricted FA) faces real retirement uncertainty, but the pull to keep playing with Bronny, still-useful production (20.9 PPG), and a stated July/August decision timeline make signing the more likely outcome before the season tips off; health (sciatica) keeps retirement a live minority.
reference_classes: Elite players still effective usually sign rather than retire
